module_map.responsibility: Orchestration: entry point for file collection, sorting, and display rendering. Coordinates between meta, flags, colors, icons, and git.
File metadata collection (from filesystem). Builds Meta struct with permissions, size, owner, date, filetype, git status, symlinks.
Output formatting. Renders Meta objects into grid/tree layout with colors, icons, padding, and alignment. Main rendering engine.
CLI argument parsing and configuration. Defines display blocks (size, permissions, owner, date, name, git), sorting, layout (grid/tree), icons, colors.
Color resolution (LSColors, theme-based). Maps file metadata (type, permissions) to terminal colors and styles.
Icon resolution. Maps file metadata (extension, type, name) to unicode or nerd font icons.
Icon and color theme data. Provides ColorTheme and IconTheme enums, git theme styling.
Git status detection. Caches and resolves git file status (modified, staged, untracked, ignored) for display.

data_flow.responsibilities: Reads filesystem: stat, permissions, owner, size, date, filetype, symlink target. Delegates to submodules (permissions.rs, owner.rs, size.rs, date.rs, name.rs, filetype.rs).
git.rs caches git status for each directory; Meta::recurse_into integrates status into Meta struct.
Applies sort criteria (by name, size, date, version, extension) from Flags::sorting.

data_flow.key_function: grid(metas, flags, colors, icons, git_theme) or tree(...)
data_flow.responsibilities: Routes to grid or tree layout; calls inner_display_grid or inner_display_tree.
For each Meta: resolve color (color.rs), resolve icon (icon.rs), build block outputs (size.render(), date_string(), permissions.render(), etc.).

data_flow.module: flags/ (size.rs, date.rs, permission.rs, etc.) + color.rs + icon.rs
data_flow.responsibilities: Each block submodule renders its column: size formats file size, date formats timestamp, permissions formats mode bits, etc. Colors applied via color.rs.

data_flow.key_function: add_header(), calculate padding from padding_rules (HashMap<Block, usize>)
data_flow.responsibilities: Pads columns to max width, adds headers, aligns tree prefix.

cross_module_hubs.reason: Central rendering hub. Called by core.rs; calls meta, flags/blocks, color.rs, icon.rs, git_theme. All output paths flow through here.
Metadata hub. Called by core.rs and display.rs; imports all meta submodules (permissions, owner, size, date, name, filetype, etc.). All file data originates here.
Orchestration hub. Called by main.rs and app.rs; calls meta, flags, display, color, icon, git. Coordinates overall workflow.
Block enumeration hub. Imported by display.rs, flags.rs, config_file.rs, and core.rs. Defines all display columns and their headers.
Color resolution hub. Called by display.rs, icon.rs, flags/color.rs, theme/color.rs. Implements LSColors and theme-based color mapping.

change_proposal.description: Add SHA-256 checksum display column to lsd. Show truncated (first 16 chars) file checksums in grid/tree layout.
files_to_modify: src/flags/blocks.rs (add Checksum variant to Block enum; update from_config, configure_from, get_header)
src/meta/mod.rs (add checksum field to Meta struct; compute SHA-256 in from_path)
src/meta/checksum.rs (NEW: Checksum struct, compute_sha256 function, Display impl)
src/display.rs (update get_output to render Checksum block; integrate into padding calculation)
src/flags/display.rs (if present: handle --checksum CLI flag; may be in blocks.rs)
Cargo.toml (add sha2 or equivalent hashing crate if not present)
new_types: Checksum struct { hash: String, truncated: String } in meta/checksum.rs
Meta.checksum: Option<Checksum> field (computed on demand or cache)
change_proposal.pattern_to_follow: Follow meta/size.rs and meta/date.rs patterns: struct with Display impl, compute function in from_path, render in display.rs via Block enum. Follow flags/blocks.rs pattern: add enum variant, header string, update configure_from and from_config.
change_proposal.integration_point: In display.rs::get_output(), add case for Block::Checksum: call meta.checksum.render(colors, icons). In meta::from_path(), compute checksum after stat (can be optional: compute only if file is regular file and small enough). In blocks.rs, add Checksum to Block enum, add header string, add to default display blocks or optional flag.
risks: Performance: computing SHA-256 for every file on every ls run is expensive. Mitigation: (1) make checksum computation optional behind --checksum flag, (2) only compute for regular files, (3) cache results if dir is re-listed, (4) skip for very large files.
Backward compatibility: existing configs/scripts will not break; checksum is optional new block. Mitigation: add to Blocks with default off or behind explicit flag.
Sorting/filtering: if users want to sort by checksum (unlikely but possible), need to extend sort.rs. Mitigation: implement later if requested; start without sort support.
Cross-platform: SHA-256 is standard; use sha2 crate for consistency. Risk low.
Test coverage: meta tests will need SHA-256 fixtures; display tests will need new checksum rendering cases.
